crowdstrike_aggregate_result_groups_name: CrowdStrike aggregate result groups (name, buckets, docCountErrorUpperBound, sumOtherDocCount)
crowdstrike_identity_sensor_records_agen: CrowdStrike identity sensor records (agentVersion, cid, deviceId, heartbeatTime, hostname, idpPolicyId, idpPolicyName, ipAddress, kerberosConfig, ldapConfig, ldapsConfig, machineDomain, ntlmConfig, osVersion, rdpToDcConfig, smbToDcConfig, status, statusCauses, tiEnabled)
crowdstrike_sensor_aggregate_query_body_: CrowdStrike sensor aggregate query body as JSON
describe_the_aggregation_you_want_to_run: Describe the aggregation you want to run, for example "count sensors by status"...
describe_the_sensors_you_want_to_search_: Describe the sensors you want to search, for example "sensors with hostnames starting with web" or "sensors with protected status"...
integrate_crowdstrike_identity_protectio: Integrate CrowdStrike Identity Protection into workflows to search sensors, fetch documented sensor details by device ID, and run documented sensor aggregate queries.
json_array_of_crowdstrike_sensor_device_: JSON array of CrowdStrike sensor device IDs
maximum_number_of_records_to_return: Maximum number of records to return
number_of_records_returned_by_the_select: Number of records returned by the selected operation
pagination_metadata_limit_offset_total_f: Pagination metadata (limit, offset, total) for query responses
pull_documented_crowdstrike_sensor_aggre: Pull documented CrowdStrike sensor aggregates and summarize the fleet distribution by version, status, or platform.
query_crowdstrike_identity_protection_se: Query CrowdStrike Identity Protection sensors and documented aggregates
Query CrowdStrike Identity Protection sensors and report on coverage, status, and devices missing protection.
